no_data_found_incorrect_assumption: Agent concluded no data exists without verifying all possible sources or codes, then acted on that assumption
incomplete_search_strategy: Agent performed multiple searches but missed a key resource type or code, failing to find existing data
incorrect_order_acceptance: Agent accepted an existing order that did not match the required specification (e.g., wrong frequency) instead of correcting it
cannot_discontinue_duplicate_orders: Agent identified duplicate active orders but lacked API capability to discontinue them, resulting in incomplete remediation
wrong_code_used_for_heart_rate: Agent searched for vital-signs category but did not find heart rate because it used the wrong code (HEARTRATE instead of the correct LOINC code) or failed to filter by the correct code
